title: Make IronDev tickets the source of truth for project work
summary: IronDev project work should be tracked as IronDev tickets inside IDA/IronDev.
problem: GitHub issues are being used as canonical implementation tickets.
proposedChange: Harden API/CLI workflow for creating IronDev tickets from discussions and external references.
acceptanceCriteria: IronDev can create tickets from a discussion/design prompt.
Tickets are stored in IronDev's own ticket model/database.
Tickets can link to GitHub issues/PRs as external references.
Future work items are created in IronDev first.

externalReferences.title: UI slice: Tickets premium workflow shell

provenance.notes: Created from discussion about making IronDev tickets canonical.
